{{Infobox starship
| name = Dragon’s Edge
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Dragon's Edge is a [[Perfected]] dreadnought vessel utilized by the forces of [[the Perfected]]. Functioning as an armed, floating city, it is a significant threat on the battlefield capable of engaging enemy fleets. During combat, the dreadnought has been observed reversing course to engage targets and activating its primary central cannons. Its presence is formidable enough that the Last [[Horizon]] must dedicate much of its attention to pinning the vessel down to prevent it from overwhelming their positions.}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Dragon’s Edge is a [[Perfected]] dreadnought mentioned by Kelthriss. During combat, this unit activates its central cannons to engage targets. However, the vessel is kept in check and pinned down by [[The Last Horizon]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Dragon’s Edge]] is a [[Perfected]] dreadnought.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c35">''The Engineer'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Dragon's Edge is a group or unit mentioned by Kelthriss.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Dragon’s Edge]] is a dreadnought that activates central cannons.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is keeping [[Dragon’s Edge]] pinned down.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38">''The Engineer'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] keeps [[Dragon’s Edge]] in check.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
